title: Cyanicula gemmata
taxonomy: Cyanicula gemmata is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This classification places it within the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. More specifically, Cyanicula gemmata is a member of the subfamily Orchidoideae and the tribe Diurideae. The genus Cyanicula itself is part of the larger family Orchidaceae and is endemic to Australia. The specific classification of Cyanicula gemmata highlights its unique position within the Orchidaceae family.
